Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if these are used by a club that[n]meets in the home economics room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe has kindly taught me how[n]to use this sewing machine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thanks to Bebe, I think I've gotten pretty[n]good at using the sewing machine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember sewing with Bebe. I hope[n]he's doing well in his home country...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if these are used during[n]home economics classes...[n]{f 1 1}
